channel.title: Mshta on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Mshta on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: LD-Lumma Stealer - DLL Side-Loading via Click Fix Phishing
item.description: A Click Fix phishing email impersonating Microsoft lured Dylan into visiting a malicious site, which executed a disguised PowerShell command launching mshta.exe to download Lumma Stealer payload from overcoatpassably.shop. The host was contained before confirmed data exfiltration.
